CWE-20.notes: Improper input validation — exploit public-facing application

CWE-22.notes: Path traversal — file discovery, data from local system

CWE-23.notes: Relative path traversal — file access outside intended directory

CWE-36.notes: Absolute path traversal — direct file path access

CWE-59.notes: Symlink following — file access, hijack execution flow

CWE-77.notes: Command injection — command and scripting interpreter, exploit public-facing application

CWE-78.notes: OS command injection — command execution, exploit public-facing application

CWE-79.notes: XSS — drive-by compromise, JavaScript execution in browser

CWE-89.notes: SQL injection — exploit public-facing application, data exfiltration

CWE-90.notes: LDAP injection — exploit public-facing application, directory traversal

CWE-94.notes: Code injection — command and scripting interpreter, exploit public-facing

CWE-95.notes: Dynamic code evaluation — scripting interpreter misuse

CWE-98.notes: PHP remote file inclusion — exploit public-facing app, Unix shell

CWE-113.notes: HTTP response splitting — drive-by compromise, session manipulation

CWE-119.notes: Buffer overflow — client-side execution, privilege escalation

CWE-120.notes: Classic buffer overflow — memory corruption, privilege escalation

CWE-121.notes: Stack-based buffer overflow — code execution via stack corruption

CWE-122.notes: Heap-based buffer overflow — heap corruption for code execution

CWE-125.notes: Out-of-bounds read — data disclosure, memory information leak

CWE-134.notes: Uncontrolled format string — arbitrary code execution, information disclosure

CWE-190.notes: Integer overflow — leads to buffer overflow, privilege escalation

CWE-200.notes: Information exposure — data from local system, file discovery

CWE-269.notes: Improper privilege management — privilege escalation, valid accounts

CWE-276.notes: Incorrect default permissions — file discovery, file and directory permissions modification

CWE-287.notes: Improper authentication — valid accounts, exploit public-facing application

CWE-306.notes: Missing authentication — valid accounts, bypass authentication

CWE-307.notes: Improper restriction of excessive auth attempts — brute force

CWE-326.notes: Inadequate encryption strength — network sniffing, crypto attack

CWE-328.notes: Reversible one-way hash — credential theft via weak hashing

CWE-362.notes: Race condition — privilege escalation via TOCTOU

CWE-384.notes: Session fixation — remote service session hijacking

CWE-416.notes: Use after free — memory corruption, code execution

CWE-434.notes: Unrestricted file upload — exploit public-facing app, script execution

CWE-476.notes: NULL pointer dereference — denial of service

CWE-502.notes: Deserialization of untrusted data — RCE via exploit public-facing app

CWE-611.notes: XXE injection — data from local system, exploit public-facing app

CWE-639.notes: IDOR — access via valid account parameter manipulation

CWE-732.notes: Incorrect permission assignment — file permissions modification, discovery

CWE-787.notes: Out-of-bounds write — memory corruption, code execution, privilege escalation

CWE-862.notes: Missing authorization — valid accounts, exploitation for privilege escalation

CWE-863.notes: Incorrect authorization — access via valid account with insufficient permission checks

CWE-918.notes: SSRF — proxy access, web service abuse for internal network recon
